info.description: WhatsApp automation bot for Kantorku.id HRIS SaaS
info.title: Customer Service Agent Bot API

post.description: Creates a new client in the workspace specified in the X-Workspace-ID header.

get.description: Returns a single client by company_id.

put.description: Partially updates a client by company_id.

delete.description: Soft-deletes a client by company_id (sets blacklisted=true).

get.description: Returns paginated activity log entries across all categories (bot, data, team).

parameters.description: Category filter: bot | data | team (default: all)
parameters.name: category

parameters.description: Resource type filter: client | invoice | template | trigger_rule | bot | team
parameters.name: resource_type

parameters.description: Filter by record ID (company_id, template_id, rule_id, invoice_id)
parameters.name: ref_id

parameters.description: ISO 8601 timestamp — return entries after this time
parameters.name: since

post.description: Records a data or team activity pushed by the dashboard.

get.description: Returns paginated clients for the workspace specified in the X-Workspace-ID header.

post.description: Starts a background export job for the workspace. Poll /jobs/{job_id} for status, then download via /jobs/{job_id}/download.
Accepts a multipart XLSX file (Template Import sheet), creates a background import job, and returns immediately with the job ID.

get.description: Returns paginated escalations for the workspace specified in the X-Workspace-ID header.

parameters.description: Search across company_id, reason, esc_id, notes
parameters.name: search

get.description: Returns paginated invoices for the workspace specified in the X-Workspace-ID header.
Returns paginated background jobs for the workspace, optionally filtered by job_type and entity_type.
Returns the current status and progress of any background job (import or export).
Streams the XLSX file for a completed export job. Returns 409 if the job is not yet done.
Returns all system_config entries. Sensitive values (tokens) are masked.

put.description: Updates the value of a single system_config key.

post.description: Creates a new client record when a Business Development team member hands off a new prospect. Requires HMAC authentication using X-Handoff-Secret header.
post.summary: Onboard New Client from BD Handoff

400.description: Invalid request body or validation error

get.description: Returns a single invoice by invoice_id.

put.description: Partially updates an invoice (safe fields only).

post.summary: Create a new master data record

get.summary: Get a single master data record by id

delete.summary: Request deletion of a master data record (creates approval)

put.summary: Reorder custom field definitions in a single transaction
Update a custom field definition (field_key immutable)

get.description: Returns paginated message templates with optional filters.
Returns a single message template by template_id.

put.description: Partially updates a message template (safe fields only).

get.summary: List notifications for the caller in this workspace

post.description: Verifies and marks a client's payment as paid after AE verification. Sends confirmation to client via WhatsApp and creates tracking record. Requires HMAC authentication using X-Verify-Secret header.

400.description: Invalid request body or validation error

get.summary: List team members in the current workspace

post.summary: Invite a new member to the team

put.summary: Replace the set of workspaces a member is assigned to

get.summary: Get the caller's full permission matrix for the current workspace
Get role with full permission matrix for current workspace

put.summary: Update one (workspace, module) permission cell for a role

get.summary: List edit logs for a specific template
List template variables available in this workspace
List workspaces visible to the caller

get.description: Triggers the bot's cron job. Creates one background job per workspace and returns immediately. Requires GCP Cloud Scheduler OIDC token authentication.

202.description: Cron jobs accepted - processing in background

401.description: Unauthorized - invalid or missing OIDC token

500.description: Internal server error - failed to start cron run

post.description: Processes check-in form submissions from clients. Marks the client as having replied to check-in and notifies the Account Executive via Telegram.
Receives incoming WhatsApp message events from HaloAI. Returns HTTP 200 immediately, then processes the message asynchronously in a background goroutine.

pic_email.description: Fields from existing DB columns previously not mapped

pre14_sent.description: Invoice reminder flags (from Master Client sheet columns 27-33)

workspace_name.description: WorkspaceName is populated for holding workspace queries only.
